description: Overall, I love it when I have a newer phone that can support the resource requirements for Lookout. It has always been very helpful that Lookout saves the location of my phone when the battery gets low in case I might forget where I left it.
author: Melissa T.
pros: Mobile security for my phone is important, and Lookout measures up. It's also not a heavy resource drain on my phone which is also important because I use my phone heavily. The ability Lookout has to monitor the integrity and functionality of the OS is also an excellent feature, especially if one does not carry a flagship mobile device.
cons: At one point, Lookout started interfering with my ability to connect to wifi. It became difficult to manage the extent to which Lookout provided security, and as my phones aged, even lightweight Lookout began to bog down the memory on my phone.

description: Pretty good experience so far. Havent't had my phone stolen yet to experience some features.
author: Olga K.
pros: It keeps my phone safe, scans all the programs constantly and keeps me alerted if anything is wrong. It's pretty cool to see a picture emailed to me if anyone tries to open my phone. I can track it pretty accurately.
cons: Sometimes, it doesnt start. It wasn't very obvious to me how to keep it constantly running in the background. Took some tuning.

author: Joe E.
pros: This application is placed on my Samsung Android phone so that I can remotely access work data like email, meetings, shared drives, and internal websites. I haven't had any issues with this application and it is working great for monitoring the security of my phone.
cons: None. Installation takes a few steps but it was not difficult and I was able to follow the instructions provided by our IT department.

description: I am confident that my phone is protected.

cons: To access location tracking, you need to go to the website. I would like to be able to do it directly from the Lookout app on another device. I

pros: I like how this software is constantly running in the background, protecting my phone from all of those viruses and hackers. Ever since my phone number had been ported out without my permission, and with it access to all my personal information, including my bank account, I can't live without this app.
cons: I haven't had any issues yet with Lookout. I would upgrade but I have identity protection with my bank so I don't need the Premium Plus version.

review_title: My experience has been satisfactory, working with this application has been easy and easy
description: I have a powerful antivirus I can find in it the solution to several problems. The first, the viruses. The second that we rob or lose the phone and we do not know how to use the native Android application. The third, that we lose all our contacts and also do not know how to get them from Google.
author: Douglas P.
pros: Lookout is not only an antivirus application for your smart phone, it also has other security components in case of loss or theft helping to protect your personal information and even locate your computer. It also protects contacts in case there is any problem where they are lost in the system. It is important to highlight that in its free version offers many opsiones and great power of protection for your smart phone.
cons: The free version is very simple, Regarding the paid version, the truth is that the only feature that could be interesting would be the extra phishing control. Everything else you can do with many other apps that also allow other extra features without paying anything for them. So if you like Lookout, stay with the free version, and above all, install it by the power of your antivirus.

author: Wyatt G.
pros: I love this app as it protects my mobile phone which I not only use for personal use but also a lot of my business use. So it is important that my mobile device is secure at all times. Lookout helps me sleep at night, knowing they are doing a great job keeping my phone secure.
cons: I have yet to dislike anything with this software.

description: Great app and very easy to use. Basically does it's job in the background.
author: Arnold H.
pros: I have this app on my phone and it is great to know that it is constantly protecting all my mobile functions.
cons: Sometimes the background scanning can drain a lot of memory and resources.

author: Brian T.
pros: We use Lookout on all of our mobile devices. Scanning is quick and easy and we have never had any issues with malware or viruses.

pros: 1) It allows you to home in on your phone relatively easily, even when a VPN is being used; 2) It offers real-time scanning when new apps are downloaded and theft protection.
cons: On occasion, it crashes on my Android phone and does not offer as many features as Avast Mobile Security.

description: It is reliable and easy to use and practical for my needs.
author: Connie T.
pros: I lost my phone a couple of times and used the GPS feature to find it successfully. Also it keeps me updated on my virus protection and if my email is being used improperly.
cons: It seems expensive but haven’t shopped around. It doesn’t present to me other capabilities that I could take advantage of.

review_title: Great software for protecting your mobile phones
author: Donovan G.
pros: It handles anti-virus for your phone really well. It is easy to use and easy to understand any errors or issues.
cons: As with any anti-virus software, I do have concerns about how up-to-date the detectable virus database is. being more transparent on this would help.

author: Michele R.
pros: Works in background keeping my cell phone safe
cons: I don't know anything I don't like. It is easy to use

review_title: Great product for monitoring phone productivity and security.
author: Crystal G.
pros: I like the ease of use and the accessibility of the app. The program is user friendly even for novice technologically inclined folks. The apps gives step by step instructions for utilizing the preinstalled security functions on the phone. Additionally, there's a lost phone option and a theft alert. I particularly appreciate the backup reminder/function. This app also assesses which update your phone has and how to access the most current update. There's lot of good going on in this app.
cons: A con is that this is a paid app. In order to access all of the functions available in the app, you must pay the fee. There are only limited functions available without purchase.

author: Syrine J.
pros: I received this software as a free trial subscription on my new computer. It was "okay" to use as a virus scan, but I ended up not purchasing the software after the trial.
cons: I didn't like that it felt convoluted to use and understand. It should be a little more simpler on the user side. Maybe adjustments have been made since I've used it.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial
